channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fox News Ends Live Coverage of Obama Presidential Center Speech and Shifts Focus to Iran Deal Discussion
item.description: Fox News interrupted its live coverage of former President Barack Obama's speech during the dedication ceremony for the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago on June 18, 2026. Obama was addressing atte...

item.title: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. Announces June 30 Return to Congress After Extended Health-Related Absence
item.description: Republican Representative Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey has announced that he plans to return in person to the U.S. House of Representatives on June 30 after being absent from public view and congression...

item.title: Report Estimates Iran War Could Generate More Than $700 Billion in Additional Revenue for Global Fossil Fuel Companies
item.description: A report released by environmental organization 350.org argues that the economic consequences of the recent war between the United States and Iran will continue long after military operations end. Acc...

item.title: Capital One Offers: Earn 1,000 Points or $10 Back When Spending Over $20 at Popular Retailers
item.description: Capital One cardholders have access to a new round of targeted Capital One Offers that provide excellent value for everyday shopping. Eligible customers can earn 1,000 Capital One miles or a $10 state...

item.title: Michelle Obama Draws Applause at Obama Presidential Center Opening With Remarks Contrasting Barack Obama and Donald Trump

item.title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani Celebrates Knicks Championship and References James Dolan's Feud With Charles Oakley During Parade Speech
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani addressed thousands of fans during the city's celebration of the New York Knicks' NBA championship, the franchise's first title since 1973. Speaking at the champions...

item.title: CNN Ends Live Coverage of JD Vance Briefing to Air Obama Presidential Center Opening Ceremony
item.description: CNN interrupted its live coverage of a White House briefing by Vice President JD Vance on Thursday in order to switch to special programming covering the grand opening of the Obama Presidential Center...

item.title: Tim Kaine Challenges Kari Lake Over Unsubstantiated Cartel Allegations During Ambassador Confirmation Hearing

item.title: Production Wraps on Sam Shepard Adaptation ‘Ages of the Moon’ Starring Steve Buscemi and Aidan Quinn
item.description: Production has officially concluded on 'Ages of the Moon,' a feature-film adaptation of the 2009 play by Pulitzer Prize-winning playwright Sam Shepard. The film stars Steve Buscemi and Aidan Quinn in ...

item.title: Trump Says Economic Concerns Influenced Decision to End Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump stated that concerns about potential economic damage were a major factor in his decision to sign a memorandum of understanding with Iran aimed at ending the conflict that began ...

item.title: Trump Defends Iran Memorandum as Markets Recover and Shipping Resumes
item.description: President Donald Trump publicly celebrated a newly signed memorandum of understanding with Iran that temporarily pauses hostilities and reopens the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping. The agreeme...

item.title: MS NOW commentator says Pete Hegseth faces political scrutiny over advice and public messaging related to Iran conflict
item.description: A discussion on MSNBC's MS NOW focused on the political fallout from President Donald Trump's handling of a conflict involving Iran and the potential consequences for Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. C...

item.title: Bureau of Prisons Defends Ghislaine Maxwell's Transfer to Texas Prison Camp Amid Congressional Criticism
item.description: The Federal Bureau of Prisons (BOP) has defended its decision to transfer Ghislaine Maxwell, the convicted associate of Jeffrey Epstein, from a prison facility in Florida to a minimum-security prison ...

item.title: Maria Bartiromo and Ro Khanna Clash Over SAVE America Act's Voting Requirements for Name Changes
item.description: During a Fox Business segment, anchor Maria Bartiromo engaged in a heated exchange with Rep. Ro Khanna (D-CA) regarding provisions in the controversial SAVE America Act. The bill, backed by former Pre...

item.title: CNN Host Audie Cornish Challenges Former Trump Aide on Obama Presidential Library Opening and Comparison to Trump-Backed Freedom 250 Event

item.title: Trump Shares Historian's Comparison Linking His Global Influence to Historical Rulers and Dictators
